name: Data Model
content:
erDiagram
    USER ||--o{ ACCOUNT : has
    USER ||--o{ ACCOUNT_SHARE : grants
    USER ||--o{ TRANSACTION : owns
    ACCOUNT ||--o{ TRANSACTION : contains
    ACCOUNT_SHARE ||--|| ACCOUNT : shares
    ACCOUNT_SHARE ||--|| USER : shared_with

    USER {
        int user_id PK
        string email
        string name
    }

    ACCOUNT {
        int account_id PK
        int user_id FK
        string account_name
        decimal balance
    }

    TRANSACTION {
        int transaction_id PK
        int user_id FK
        int account_id FK
        decimal amount
        string description
        datetime date
    }

    ACCOUNT_SHARE {
        int share_id PK
        int account_id FK
        int owner_user_id FK
        int shared_with_user_id FK
        datetime shared_date
    }
